violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. -Thermometers in2 small fridges were not accurate.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in kitchen need more thorough cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Container of glass cleaner and bleach not labeled at front counter.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Small fridge at 48F.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Container of food sitting atop kitchen handwash sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Cloth rugs on kitchen floor and cook area must be removed.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -2 soiled mops sitting in mop bucket.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
